$schema_note: Golden dataset for RAG quality testing. Two sections: 'specific_facts' (fact-checking against finnova_case_study.docx) and 'concept_questions' (testing understanding across all 10 QA/AI documents).
source_documents: Advanced LLM Red Teaming and Adversarial Testing Strategies for QA Engineers.docx
Architecting LLM-as-a-Judge Evaluation Frameworks for Generative AI Features.docx
Data Integrity and Distributed Systems Automation_ GraphQL, Kafka, and Database Validation.docx
Enterprise Playwright Automation Architecture for Scalable SaaS Platforms.docx
Implementing Model Context Protocol (MCP) in Agentic Test Orchestration.docx

specific_facts.question: How many specialized AI agents were deployed at FinNova Bank?
By what percentage did production bugs drop at FinNova Bank?
How much did FinNova save annually in operating costs?
What was the mean time to detection (MTTD) before and after the engagement?
How many automated test cases did the Test Generator agent produce?
What was the flake rate before and after the engagement?
specific_facts.note: Fact not in current RAG corpus — honest refusal is acceptable

specific_facts.question: How many retail customers does FinNova Bank serve?
What is the annual transaction volume of FinNova Bank?
Where are FinNova Bank's engineering hubs located?
What happened during the Black Friday wire transfer outage in November 2024?
What incident did the Red Team Bot prevent on March 15, 2025?
specific_facts.note: Fact not in current RAG corpus — honest refusal is acceptable

specific_facts.question: What did the Data Integrity Verifier catch on May 22, 2025?
specific_facts.note: Fact not in current RAG corpus — honest refusal is acceptable

specific_facts.question: What does the Test Generator agent do?
What is the purpose of Agent 3 - RAG Quality Gate?
How many high-severity vulnerabilities did the Red Team Bot catch?

concept_questions.question: What are the best practices for test data isolation in Playwright?
concept_questions.note: Should mention multi-tenant isolation, dynamic data seeding, or context pooling

concept_questions.question: What are the main categories of prompt injection attacks that QA should test for?
concept_questions.note: Should mention at least 2 of: direct injection, indirect injection, jailbreak, extraction, tool-call hijack

concept_questions.question: How do you measure and prevent hallucinations in RAG systems?
concept_questions.note: Should discuss faithfulness metric, context grounding, claim extraction

concept_questions.question: What is the difference between classic Page Object Model and component-driven POM?
concept_questions.note: Should explain why component-driven scales better than monolithic page classes

concept_questions.question: What are the key principles when designing LLM-as-a-judge evaluation frameworks?
concept_questions.note: Should mention rubrics, bias mitigation, evaluation criteria

concept_questions.question: What is the Model Context Protocol (MCP) and what are its core components?
concept_questions.note: Should mention Server/Client/Host architecture and Tools/Resources/Prompts primitives

concept_questions.question: What strategies are most effective at reducing test flakiness in Playwright?
concept_questions.note: Should mention web-first locators, network response waiting, data isolation

concept_questions.question: How do you test event-driven systems with Kafka in distributed environments?
concept_questions.note: Should mention correlation IDs, consumer setup before triggering, payload validation

concept_questions.question: What quality gates should be in place for AI/LLM features in CI/CD pipelines?
concept_questions.note: Should mention eval suite pass rates, faithfulness thresholds, regression gates

concept_questions.question: What is the methodology for AI red teaming and which OWASP standard guides it?
concept_questions.note: Should reference OWASP LLM Top 10, adversarial testing, defense-in-depth

negative_tests.question: What is FinNova Bank's CEO's favorite color?
negative_tests.note: Negative test — answer should admit lack of info, NOT hallucinate

negative_tests.question: How many employees worked on the FinNova engagement from Anthropic?
negative_tests.note: Document says 1 ML engineer from Anthropic — should not inflate the number
